rows.name: Summoned by Slaughter
rows.text: Until the end of the phase, the unit gains the Summon Daemons on Death ability.

rows.name: Super-heavy War Engine
rows.text:
This model can move through enemy models and terrain.
This model has the Move Through Tall ability.

rows.name: Supreme Commander
rows.text: This model gains the Must Be Warlord ability.

rows.name: Swooping Predator
rows.text:
During the Movement phase, until the end of the phase:
  -> Roll one 6D6: on a 4+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rows.name: Talons of Butchery
rows.text: This model's Maulerfiend Fists gains [CLEAVE 2].

rows.name: The Betrayer
rows.text: During the Charge phase, at the end of the phase, in your turn, until the end of the phase, while this model leads a unit, if not an enemy unit is within engagement range, roll one 2D6: on a leadership+, nothing happens; otherwise, destroy 1 model in the unit.

rows.name: The Scent of Blood
rows.text:
During the Charge phase, while an enemy unit is within 9":
  Select one of the following (Enemy Weakness Within 9"):
    - This model gets +1 to Charge rolls.
    - This model gets +2 to Charge rolls.

rows.name: To Slake its Rage
rows.text: The unit gains the Advance and Charge ability.

rows.name: Trail of Destruction
rows.text: Until the end of the phase, the unit's weapons gain [MOBILE].

rows.name: Unleash Hell
rows.text: During the Shooting phase, until the end of the phase, the unit gains the Vehicle Sustained Hits 1 ability.

rows.name: Unleash Wrath
rows.text:
During the Movement phase, in the opponent's turn, while an enemy unit is within 12", until the end of the phase:
  Select one of the following (Shoot At or Charge the Arriving Unit):
    - Each time this model is destroyed, it can shoot before being removed from play.
    - This model gains the Reactive Charge ability.

rows.name: Unrelenting Advance
rows.text: Until the end of the phase, this model has the Reactive Move 6" ability.

rows.name: Violent Demise
rows.text:
Modify this model's Deadly Demise Threshold characteristic to 2.
Modify this model's Deadly Demise Amount characteristic to D3+1.

rows.name: Warp Stalkers
rows.text: Until the end of the phase, the unit can move through enemy models and terrain.

rows.name: Wrath Beyond Reason
rows.text: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, reduce the Damage of that attack by 1.

rows.name: Wrath of Khorne
rows.text:
During the Fight phase, until the end of the phase:
  Select one of the following (Boon of Martial Might):
    - The unit's melee weapons gain [CLEAVE 1].
    - Add 1 to the unit's Armour Penetration characteristic (melee).

rows.name: Wrathful Presence
rows.text: At the start of the phase, until the end of the battle round, this model gains the Wrathful Presence Selection ability.
